zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Arundel於大約1351年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Sir Edmund Arundel24歲，母親Sybil Montagu21歲。她於1368年之前與Sir Leonard Carew在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1385年3月23日在英國英格蘭戴文享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Arundel于大约1351年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲Sir Edmund Arundel24岁，母亲Sybil Montagu21岁。她于1368年之前与Sir Leonard Carew在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1385年3月23日在英国英格兰戴文享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Arundel was born about 1351, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Edmund Arundel, was 24 and her mother, Sybil Montagu, was 21. She married Sir Leonard Carew before 1368, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 23 March 1385, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Arundel est née environ 1351, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Arundel, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sybil Montagu, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Leonard Carew avant 1368, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1385, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Arundel um 1351 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edmund Arundel 24 und ihre Mutter Sybil Montagu 21. Sie hat vor 1368 in Devon, England Sir Leonard Carew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 23. März 1385 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Arundel è nata il circa 1351 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Edmund Arundel, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Sybil Montagu, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Leonard Carew prima del 1368, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 23 marzo 1385, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Arundelが約1351年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Arundelは24歳，母Sybil Montaguは21歳であった。1368年以前にイギリスデボンでSir Leonard Carewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1385年3月23日にイギリスイギリスデボンで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Arundel(이)가 대략 1351년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edmund Arundel(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Montagu(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1368년 이전 영국 데폰에서 Sir Leonard Carew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 3월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Arundel nasceu aproximadamente 1351, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Arundel, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Montagu, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Leonard Carew antes 1368, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1385, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Arundel родилась около 1351 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edmund Arundel было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil Montagu, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Leonard Carew перед 1368 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 23 марта 1385 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Arundel nació aproximadamente 1351, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund Arundel, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sybil Montagu, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Leonard Carew antes de 1368, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1385, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
